reference: I understand your concern. Do not dismiss this or ignore the doctor; however, he will need to get a skin biopsy in order to definitely confirm skin cancer. Ask him to see a doctor for evaluation and determination of the need for one. I hope this helps.
text: I understand what you're saying. Do not dismiss this or ignore the doctor. However, you will need to get a skin biopsy in order to determine if you are asleep or not. Ask him to see a doctor for evaluation and determine if you are awake or not. I hope this helps you.
